changelog: COMPREHENSIVE FIX: All 13 settings-engine disconnects resolved
Fixed: Digit entry style - Pop-up modal now implemented
Fixed: Sticky mode - Digit-first entry works
Fixed: Two taps to edit - Double-tap detection added
Fixed: Show digit counts - Count/9 displayed on pad
Fixed: Auto pencil erase - Removes from peer notes
Fixed: Show crosshairs - Row/column highlighting works
Fixed: Highlight digits - Now conditional on setting
Fixed: Initial digits styling - Bold/background conditional
Fixed: Disable all help - Master toggle blocks helpers
Fixed: Flag conflicts - Conditional on setting
Fixed: Flag incorrect - Compares with solution
Fixed: Settings sync - Real-time UI updates
